response.overview: Mario gets ready for Halloween in his Spider‑Man costume when Shrek calls him over, revealing he’s dressed as Mario with a mustache he claims to have grown overnight. Shrek insists people will mistake him for the real Mario, and Woody immediately proves him right by calling both of them Mario while wearing a Froot Loops box costume. Mr. Pig arrives in a Star Wars outfit and also mixes them up, getting angry when Mario mocks his costume. He storms off to get Black Yoshi, who shows up with his Glock and demands to know why there are two Marios. Mario tries to explain, but Black Yoshi only believes it after removing Shrek’s hat and mustache. With the confusion cleared, Black Yoshi returns to Call of Duty while Mario grabs his Spider‑Man suit. A post‑scene shows Black Yoshi trick‑or‑treating, confronting Toad, and taking his candy before wishing viewers a Happy Halloween.
response.title: Shrek's Costume

cast.name: Lance Thirtyacre
cast.character: Shrek, Black Yoshi, Woody, Mr. Pigs
